events.title: Brokeback Mountain
events.description:
Come watch Brokeback Mountain with Chicago's funniest comedians, who will be making jokes, running a drinking game, and instigating other shenanigans throughout. Come laugh! Come drink!

Doors 9:00pm. Show at 10pm.

21+ show

Featuring: Andie Nash, Zach Masso, and Seth Lowery

Laugh-Along, Live! is a comedy show, movie screening, and party wrapped in one. A panel of comedians makes jokes throughout a film (à la Mystery Science Theater, but more about having fun than making fun) and run activities for the audience. Follow us @laughalonglive to know which movies we're doing next (after you've bought your tickets for this one, of course).

events.title: But I'm a Cheerleader
events.description:
Come watch But I'm a Cheerleader with Chicago's funniest comedians, who will be making jokes, running a drinking game, and instigating other shenanigans throughout. Come laugh! Come drink!

Doors 8:00pm. Show at 10pm

21+ show

Featuring: fae liley, Emmanuel J Ross Hartway, and Emilia Barrosse

Laugh-Along, Live! is a comedy show, movie screening, and party wrapped in one. A panel of comedians makes jokes throughout a film (à la Mystery Science Theater, but more about having fun than making fun) and run activities for the audience. Follow us @laughalonglive to know which movies we're doing next (after you've bought your tickets for this one, of course).

events.title: BurLGBTQesque
events.description:
Celebrate Pride Month with a night of burlesque, variety entertainment, and queer joy at BurLGBTQesque! This dazzling showcase honors the rich tradition of LGBTQ+ performance art while spotlighting the incredible talent, creativity, and self-expression of today’s queer performers and allies.

Featuring burlesque performances by Ronnie Rouge, Dizzie Daisie, Manny Schevitz, Gemini Blackheart, Raye Mantique, Vera Style, and Gata Habbie, audiences can expect an evening of glamour, comedy, storytelling, sensuality, and spectacular showmanship. The celebration continues with incredible variety performances by Katie Rae Horn and Thom Britton, bringing even more excitement and artistry to the stage. With our fabulous stage kitten, Chantilly Chantelle, helping spread the love and collect your appreciation for the performers throughout the night.

Join us as we celebrate queer performers, queer stories, and queer joy through performance art! Come proud and come loud  for a night of queer burlesque and variety performances you’ll never forget!

events.title: Batlesque
events.description:
Na na na na na na na na... Batlesque!

Join us on the Main Stage at Stars and Garters for an unforgettable evening of Batman themed parody burlesque. The Starlets, our resident burlesque troupe, invite you into a playful and provocative reimagining of Gotham City's most iconic heroes and villains.

Featuring burlesque performances by Gata Habbie, Gemini Blackheart, Manny Schevitz, Raye Mantique, and Ronnie Rouge, this spectacular lineup also showcases the incredible variety talents of Katie Rae Horn and Kayla Janelle. Guiding you through the chaos of Gotham are your hosts, Dizzie Daisie and Lucky Charm, with our fabulous kitten, Chantilly Chantelle.

Watch as your favorite DC characters leap from the pages of comic books and onto the stage in dazzling, unexpected, and delightfully cheeky ways. From Batman and Harley Quinn to The Joker, Catwoman, The Riddler, Poison Ivy, Alfred, Penguin, and Two-Face, these beloved characters are transformed through glitter, glamour, comedy, and tease.

Whether you're a lifelong comic book fan, a burlesque enthusiast, or simply looking for a one-of-a-kind night out, Batlesque promises an evening packed with laughter, spectacle, and Gotham-sized entertainment.

Holy tassels, Batman... you won't want to miss this one!
